title: stelis tritriangulata
intro: Stelis tritriangulata, also known as the Three-angled Stelis, is a flowering orchid species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. Stelis tritriangulata has been reported to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
